mapper.sql: select p.project_id, p.park_id, p.customer_id, p.flow_id, p.business_id, p.business_type, p.project_name, p.enterprise_name, p.credit_code, p.applicant, p.applicant_dept, p.applicant_time, p.shareholder_info, p.business_scope, p.responsible_person, p.contact_phone, p.lease_floor, p.lease_area, p.rent_price, p.deposit, p.rent_free_period, p.lease_start_date, p.lease_end_date, p.current_node, p.current_node_name, p.process_status, p.approval_result, p.summary, p.approval_matter, p.approval_form_json, p.approval_form_url, p.archive_time, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, coalesce(m.material_count, 0) as material_count, coalesce(l.log_count, 0) as log_count from biz_approval_project p left join ( select project_id, count(*) as material_count from biz_approval_material group by project_id ) m on m.project_id = p.project_id left join ( select project_id, count(*) as log_count from biz_approval_log group by project_id ) l on l.project_id = p.project_id
mapper.select: order by p.create_time desc, p.project_id desc
order by p.create_time desc, p.project_id desc

select p.process_status as processStatus, count(1) as total from biz_approval_project p
group by p.process_status
mapper.insert:
insert into biz_approval_project
park_id, customer_id, flow_id, business_id, business_type, project_name, enterprise_name, credit_code, applicant, applicant_dept, applicant_time, shareholder_info, business_scope, responsible_person, contact_phone, lease_floor, lease_area, rent_price, deposit, rent_free_period, lease_start_date, lease_end_date, current_node, current_node_name, process_status, approval_result, summary, approval_matter, approval_form_json, approval_form_url, archive_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time,
#{parkId}, #{customerId}, #{flowId}, #{businessId}, #{businessType}, #{projectName}, #{enterpriseName}, #{creditCode}, #{applicant}, #{applicantDept}, #{applicantTime}, #{shareholderInfo}, #{businessScope}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{leaseFloor}, #{leaseArea}, #{rentPrice}, #{deposit}, #{rentFreePeriod}, #{leaseStartDate}, #{leaseEndDate}, #{currentNode}, #{currentNodeName}, #{processStatus}, #{approvalResult}, #{summary}, #{approvalMatter}, #{approvalFormJson}, #{approvalFormUrl}, #{archiveTime}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime},
mapper.update: update biz_approval_project set process_status = #{processStatus}, current_node = #{currentNode}, current_node_name = #{currentNodeName}, approval_result = #{approvalResult}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where project_id = #{projectId} and park_id = #{parkId}
update biz_approval_project set process_status = '5', archive_time = now(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where project_id = #{projectId} and park_id = #{parkId}
